title: User
description: Schema for user documents in Firestore (one document type only). Timestamps accept either RFC3339 strings or Firestore timestamp objects.

birthday.description: The user's birthday. Accepts an RFC3339 date-time string or a Firestore timestamp object {seconds,nanos}.

created_time.description: The time when the user was created. Accepts an RFC3339 date-time string or a Firestore timestamp object {seconds,nanos}.

display_name.description: The display name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

photo_url.description: The URL of the user's profile photo

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user (Auth UID / document id)
